prompt: We're about to add 5 new skills to ValidationForge. What's the minimum bar they need to meet so the overall benchmark grade doesn't drop from A to B?
expected_output: User checks current aggregate score from prior baseline. Calculates: skills weight 20%, current skill_score N%. New skills must have avg frontmatter/description score ≥ X to keep aggregate ≥ 90. (Actual math depends on current baseline.)
